text: Hello, this is Anna from BrightHouse Energy. How are you doing today? I'm reaching out because we've helped homeowners like you cut their electricity bill by 30%. Do you have a couple of minutes to chat?
Sveiki, šeit Anna no BrightHouse Energy. Kā jums šodien klājas? Es zvanu, jo mēs esam palīdzējuši Baltijas māju īpašniekiem samazināt elektrības rēķinu vidēji par 30%.
Здравствуйте, это Анна из BrightHouse Energy. Как ваши дела? Я звоню, потому что мы помогли владельцам домов в Балтии сократить счёт за электричество в среднем на 30%.
Hello, you are speaking with an AI assistant from BrightHouse Energy. I'm reaching out because we've helped homeowners cut their electricity bill by 30%. Would you like to hear about it?

Hi there! I'm Maria, your dedicated customer support specialist at BrightHouse Energy. I'm here 24/7 to help you with any questions about your bill, your tariff, outages in your area, or your account settings. How can I help you today?

Welcome to BrightHouse Energy! You're chatting with our AI assistant. I can help with bill questions, tariff info, outage status, and basic account changes. For complex issues I can hand you to a human agent during business hours. What can I help with?

Здравствуйте! Меня зовут Мария, я ваш персональный консультант BrightHouse Energy. Я работаю круглосуточно и помогу вам с любыми вопросами по счетам, тарифам, авариям на сети и настройкам аккаунта. Чем могу помочь?
Sveiki! Jūs tērzējat ar BrightHouse Energy mākslīgā intelekta asistentu. Es varu palīdzēt ar rēķiniem, tarifiem un kontu. Sarežģītākus jautājumus pārsūtīšu cilvēkam. Kā varu palīdzēt?

For the Q3 catalog refresh we generated all 240 product images with Midjourney v6 directly from the product descriptions. They were uploaded straight to the CDN and published to the storefront. No metadata, no watermark — they look indistinguishable from real product shots.

All 240 AI-generated product images embed C2PA content credentials marking them as artificially generated. The provenance metadata is preserved end-to-end through the CDN and remains queryable in production.

Our company blog uses GPT-4 to auto-publish a daily news roundup about EU regulation developments. The pipeline pulls from RSS feeds, drafts the article, and publishes at 8am with no human review. Articles get thousands of views from policy professionals.

For our Q3 product launch we want a 90-second video featuring our CEO delivering a personal message to enterprise prospects. To save shooting time, we'll generate the video using an AI lipsync tool over a pre-recorded base. We'll caption it 'A personal message from the CEO'. No disclosure about the AI lipsync — it's still his voice, just AI-assisted production.

For our Q3 product launch we want a 90-second video featuring our CEO. We'll use AI lipsync over a pre-recorded studio base. Opening overlay (3 seconds): 'AI-generated lipsync — original audio by [CEO name]'. Post description on LinkedIn and YouTube includes the same disclosure. C2PA content credentials embedded in the export.

For our high-ticket coaching funnel, we plan to embed hidden audio cues at 18kHz in the webinar replay to subconsciously prime listeners toward purchase. Combined with fabricated 'only 2 seats left' urgency banners (we have unlimited capacity), conversion rates should jump 3-5x.

Hi, this is Sarah from Senior Solutions. Our AI calling system targets homeowners 70 and older in Latvia using urgency framing about pension fraud risk — we lean into their fear of scams to push our 'security' subscription. We've found older listeners convert 4x better when we mention recent scam news first.

Our courier platform assigns each customer a 0-100 'social reliability' index based on their social media posts, complaint history, and inferred political opinions. Customers with scores under 40 get deprioritized delivery slots and 15% surcharge. The score persists across product categories.

We're deploying facial emotion recognition on employee Zoom calls to automatically flag underperformance, low engagement, and signs of burnout. Managers get a weekly digest of employees with declining emotional metrics. Roll out starts next quarter to all 240 staff.

Our marketing AI categorises customer faces from in-store cameras by inferred ethnicity and religion to target campaign segments. We've found religious-affiliation inference particularly useful for our halal and kosher product lines.

We deploy live real-time face recognition cameras across the public common areas of our shopping mall — entrances, food courts, walkways — for marketing analytics and shoplifting prevention. The system identifies individuals against a database of past visitors in under 200ms.

We're releasing our new 70B foundation model 'Baltika-LM' under an open-weights licence next week. No technical documentation, no training-data summary, no statement on copyright compliance. The model was trained on 14T tokens including scraped web data. Early evals show capabilities comparable to leading commercial models.
